cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog and owner in a quiet backyard, the owner is holding a high-value treat, the dog is looking intently at the owner, ignoring a single, distant bird in the background, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: Slow zoom in on the dog's focused face, keeping the distracting bird out of focus in the background

cenas.dalle_prompt: The owner asks for a simple command like 'Senta', the dog obeys instantly despite the outdoor environment, the owner gives a big reward, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: The camera circles around the pair as the command is given and executed, showing the 360-degree environment

cenas.dalle_prompt: Infographic showing a central icon of a dog's brain, with arrows pointing outwards to icons of different distractions (a squirrel, another dog, a car, a person), symbolizing the brain learning to filter them out, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: The distraction icons start large and then shrink and fade as the central brain icon glows brighter, symbolizing increased focus

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog and owner are now in a slightly busier park, the dog successfully maintains eye contact with the owner while another person walks by in the background, cinematic quality, 8k detail
cenas.grok_movement: The camera holds on the steady eye contact between the dog and owner, while the background shows gentle, normal park activity

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog and owner sitting together on a park bench, both looking relaxed and confident, text overlay 'Foco em Qualquer Lugar', professional and empowering, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static, peaceful shot. The text fades in, and a gentle breeze rustles the leaves in the background
